claim: Generalize the specific claim in atom ATOM_T001_S037_05 ("So we can train another model to try to explain the first model. And we're go...") to the broader category implied by atom ATOM_T004_S002_01: state the claim as a class-level property of the category, not just the specific case.
why_novel_vs_speaker: The speaker states the claim at one level of specificity in S037. Lifting to S002's framing is a generalization the speaker did not state.
why_potentially_useful: Class-level generalization is a candidate research direction if the specific claim is shown to extend; if it doesn't extend, the boundary itself is a finding.
